FBE_EVENT_TAINTED_CAIN.title: Cain
FBE_EVENT_TAINTED_CAIN.talk.firstVisitEv: A fresh face from the basement. Take these Tier 4 items. They are no use to me anyway...
FBE_EVENT_TAINTED_CAIN.talk.ANY.0-0r.anc: Choose one item to take. Then I will break down the other two.
FBE_EVENT_TAINTED_CAIN.talk.ANY.1-0r.anc: Nothing you like? Hah, if only you could skip...
FBE_EVENT_TAINTED_CAIN.talk.ANY.2-0r.anc: I like pickups. The more, the better. Cards are much the same.
FBE_EVENT_TAINTED_CAIN.talk.IRONCLAD.0-0: I do not know what your deal is, but you are definitely not opening any Angel Rooms.
